commands.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_joinset_spawn_fanout_example" CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo run -p asupersync --example spawn_fanout
commands.observed_signal: remote required; refusing local fallback (no worker assigned)

probe.freshness_note: Installed version and exec-help capability evidence were refreshed on 2026-07-16; the remote-required refusal fixture remains the separately dated 2026-06-15 observation and is not claimed fresh.
help_excerpt: Execute a compilation command on a remote worker

remote_required_env.evidence: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 caused local fallback refusal when no worker was assigned.

queue_when_busy_env.evidence: RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY=1 is used by existing repo proof lanes and does not change the no-local-fallback contract.

clean_overlay_flags.evidence: rch exec --help for installed version 1.0.49 exposes no clean-overlay options.

installed_help_json.evidence: rch exec --help exposes --help-json through the shared command option surface.

drift_findings.observed: Clean-overlay runbooks document an overlay-scoped command shape with --base, --clean-overlay, and --overlay-path.
drift_findings.operator_action: Fail closed to capability-drift receipt; do not emit a Cargo proof command or claim peer dirt was excluded without supported capability evidence plus an admitted command and terminal execution evidence.

drift_findings.observed: RCH can refuse before worker assignment with active_project_exclusion or health preflight pressure.
drift_findings.operator_action: Record rerun-required or parked proof; never cite the refusal as green evidence.

no_claim_boundaries: No permission to delete files, clean worktrees, create branches, or create worktrees.
No claim that documented clean-overlay flags are available unless installed capability evidence says they are supported.
